courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Vista Stair
genericDescription: Use height as design material; control visibility and anticipation; support navigation across layered spaces.
specificDescription: A layered stair-and-lift level where high balconies reveal threats, rewards, and destinations before the player can reach them.
gradingRubric: 30 pts vertical design; 20 pts sightline composition; 20 pts navigation clarity; 15 pts mechanic integration; 15 pts notes.
